fact_verdicts.note: Action id, type TreasuryWithdrawals, proposed epoch 638, and expiry after epoch 645 all match the on-chain action metadata.
Anchor body title is exactly "Withdraw 1,310,960 ada for Hardware Wallet Maintenance 2026".
Budget Summary table lists WP1 at 1,272,777 ADA, Intersect Budget Administration fee at 38,183 ADA, Total 1,310,960 ADA.
Motivation section states 12 months of production maintenance covering exactly these scope items, including cardano-hw-cli and vendor-triggered audits.
Motivation states verbatim it is a continuity proposal, not a new wallet product, with scope limited to compatibility, security, libraries/tooling, release support, and vendor-required audit work.
Rationale's Intersect Budget Process section states the 67% Hydra Voting threshold and advancement under the approved Budget Process Framework.
Net Change Limit Compliance section states the request does not breach the 350M NCL covering Epoch 613 to Epoch 713, on its own or in aggregate, at time of submission.

Audit & Oversight section matches: costs in overhead, admin fee covers administrative oversight, independent oversight via Intersect and a technically capable third party with reporting and milestone-based disbursement controls.
Prior Treasury Funding Disclosure lists the three named gov.tools items plus exactly six Project Catalyst links.
Anchor names the Sundae Labs treasury management framework, and the 2026 TRSC stake address equals the on-chain rewards recipient.
Oversight Committee is named as Sundae Labs, Cardano Foundation, Dquadrant, NMKR, Sundial and Eternl.
All five permission thresholds (Fund/Modify 2-2-1, Disburse 2-3-2, Pause/Resume 2-1, Sweep 1-1, Reorganize 2 admins + 3 trusted entities) match the anchor exactly.
On-chain context: 14 withdrawal proposals totalling 57273260000000 lovelace, first 2026-06-23 16:14:33, last 2026-06-26 13:51:52 — exact match.
On-chain context states yes=50 no=15 abstain=3, explicit ballots not stake-weighted.
Treasury flow figures match exactly: inflow 158838297854652, enacted withdrawals 361435336000000, ratio 2.275492 over 36 epochs.
values_hierarchy.md ranks constitutional integrity/protocol safety first, then treasury stewardship, evidence quality, ecosystem growth, execution speed — in that order.
treasury_spending_doctrine.md explicitly rejects FCFS and adopts the rolling-window Net Change Limit framework.

values_hierarchy.md states ABSTAIN preference for weak-evidence growth conflicts and the soft-gate caution penalty for non-verifiable upside; 'recorded as explicit uncertainty' is a fair paraphrase of the NEEDS_MORE_INFO fallback that must name outstanding evidence.

verification.summary: All 19 dossier facts are supported by the source material. Numeric values (withdrawal amount 1,310,960 ADA / 1310960000000 lovelace, budget line items, epochs 638/645, NCL 350M over epochs 613-713, recipient history of 14 proposals totalling 57273260000000 lovelace, vote counts 50/15/3, treasury flow figures and ratio 2.275492), the recipient stake address, multisig permission thresholds, Oversight Committee membership, and doctrine ordering all match exactly. No contradictions and no invented specifics were found.
